title: A Descriptive Analysis of Streptococcus suis-Associated Disease in Irish Pigs from 2010 to 2024: Serotypes, Pathology, and Antimicrobial Resistance
author: Moriarty, John
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: This file is the accompanying supplementary information for the paper entitled "  A Descriptive Analysis of  Streptococcus suis -Associated Disease in Irish Pigs from 2010 to 2024: Serotypes, Pathology, and Antimicrobial Resistance   ".  It contains primer sequences for PCR and antibiotic breakpoints used in antimicrobial susceptibility testing.
steps_raw: This file is the accompanying supplementary information for the paper entitled "  A Descriptive Analysis of  Streptococcus suis -Associated Disease in Irish Pigs from 2010 to 2024: Serotypes, Pathology, and Antimicrobial Resistance   ".  It contains primer sequences for PCR and antibiotic breakpoints used in antimicrobial susceptibility testing.
